text: We have a special guest [laughter] for
you to welcome you.
>> We got a mughle. It's so cute. You're so
fluffy.
>> I mean, I for one like the British
accents. I think we should have more of
that.
>> He's about my height, I'd say.
>> Yeah. Also, his feet [music] start.
>> I mean, like, also his hair adds about 7
in at least.
>> He's living his best life. I want to be
that ruggle. [music]
>> I wonder like how many players would
experience just this one version of this
cut scene.
>> What does an average day look like on
the localization team?
>> Average is a choice of words. I'm not
sure if I would use it. Memories and
nostalgia flooding back and like yes
voice recording is the greatest thing
ever.
>> Such devastation.
This was not my intention. I have lived
a thousand thousand of your lives.
>> Laughs are always so hard to act.
[laughter]
It's my studio.
>> [laughter]
